# t4o_quota_types (Data Source)

Lists the available T4O backup quota types. Use a `quota_types[*].id` as the `quota_type_id` for `t4o_project_quota`.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `quota_types` (Attributes List) List of quota types. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--quota_types))

<a id="nestedatt--quota_types"></a>
### Nested Schema for `quota_types`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String)
- `id` (String) Quota-type UUID (use as `quota_type_id`).
- `name` (String) Display name.
- `status` (String)
